title: Fx_Mass, Fy_Mass, Fz_Mass Property
description: This sets or returns the value of the virtual coefficient of inertia for force control in the specified axis of the force in the translational direction.
see_also:
Applies To

Force Control
 Fy_Mass, Fz_Mass Property

Fx_Damper, Fy_Damper, Fz_Damper Property
examples:
Function Test_Mass FSet FCS1.Orientation, FG_TOOL FSet FC1.CoordinateSystem, FCS1 FSet FC1.Enabled, True, False, False, False, False, False FSet FC1.Fx_Spring, 0.01 FSet FC1.Fx_Damper, 4 FSet FC1.Fx_Mass, 5 Move CurPos +X(10) FC1
Fend
